creator: freebsd-bug@kirpa.com
text:
For install need floppies directory. Some old servers not have CD/DVD/usb and http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/install-start.html still have reference for floppies install.

Fix: 

add floppies directory
How-To-Repeat: read ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/8.0-BETA3/
